name: Mauritius Mass Finder v24.10
update_message_en: A new version of Mauritius Mass Finder is available.
update_message_fr: Une nouvelle version de Trouver une Messe à Maurice est disponible.
notes: Fast-win UX release: native Web Share API with clipboard fallback, time-of-day filtering, compact mobile quick cards, corrected French location notice, and preserved Near Me ranking precedence.
